---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that maildancer doesn't support today? Describe the
use case, not just the proposed solution.

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it touches the mail path, auth, or the privilege-
separation boundaries, note that -- those need design discussion before code.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Relevant RFCs, prior art in other mail servers, or links.
